input: Stratify: 38yo female, BRCA1 pathogenic germline variant (c.5266dupC), triple-negative breast cancer stage IIIA, ECOG 1. Planned treatment: dose-dense AC-T + olaparib maintenance. CYP2D6 *1/*1, no HLA risk alleles. Charlson comorbidity index 0.

expected_details.rationale: High-penetrance BRCA1 + advanced stage + actionable for PARP inhibitor

input: Stratify: 52yo male, MLH1 pathogenic variant (germline), colorectal cancer stage II (MSI-H/dMMR). ECOG 0. No planned chemotherapy (observation per guidelines for stage II MSI-H). CYP2D6 *1/*2, DPYD *1/*1. Charlson 1 (hypertension).

expected_details.rationale: High genetic risk but early stage + favorable prognosis for MSI-H stage II

input: Stratify: 65yo female, EGFR L858R somatic mutation, NSCLC stage IV. ECOG 1. Planned treatment: osimertinib. CYP3A4 *1/*22 (reduced function). No germline pathogenic variants. Charlson 2 (diabetes, hypertension).

expected_details.rationale: Actionable driver + advanced stage; PGx adds modest risk from CYP3A4 reduced function

input: Stratify: 58yo male, colorectal cancer stage III. Planned treatment: FOLFOX. DPYD *1/*2A (heterozygous — intermediate metabolizer). No germline cancer predisposition variants. MSS. ECOG 0. Charlson 0.

expected_details.rationale: The PGx finding is the dominant risk driver; DPYD*2A heterozygous = severe toxicity risk without dose reduction

input: Stratify: 62yo male, prostate cancer Gleason 3+3=6, stage T1c, PSA 5.2. No germline BRCA1/2 or ATM variants. No actionable somatic mutations. ECOG 0. No PGx concerns (no systemic therapy planned — active surveillance). Charlson 1 (mild COPD).

expected_details.rationale: Very low risk across all dimensions; active surveillance is guideline-concordant

input: Stratify: 34yo male, newly diagnosed HIV. Planned ART regimen includes abacavir. HLA-B*57:01 POSITIVE. CD4 count 350. No comorbidities. Charlson 0.

expected_details.rationale: PGx risk dominates — HLA-B*57:01 mandates abacavir avoidance

input: Stratify: 55yo male, AML with FLT3-ITD mutation (allelic ratio 0.7), NPM1 wild-type, adverse cytogenetics (complex karyotype). ECOG 1. Planned: 7+3 induction + midostaurin. CYP3A4 *1/*1 (normal). Charlson 1.

key_recommendations: allogeneic stem cell transplant in CR1
expected_details.rationale: FLT3-ITD high ratio + NPM1 wt + adverse cytogenetics = ELN adverse risk; transplant indicated

input: Stratify: 70yo female, breast cancer HR+/HER2-. Planned: tamoxifen. CYP2D6 *4/*4 (poor metabolizer). Also on fluoxetine (strong CYP2D6 inhibitor — phenoconversion irrelevant since already PM). CYP2C19 *2/*2 (PM). Charlson 3 (CHF, diabetes, CKD).

expected_details.rationale: CYP2D6 PM = no endoxifen production from tamoxifen; must use AI instead; multiple PGx + comorbidity burden

input: Stratify: 25yo female, Li-Fraumeni syndrome (TP53 germline R248W). Currently cancer-free. No somatic findings. ECOG 0. No medications planned. Family history: mother breast cancer age 32, brother osteosarcoma age 14.

expected_details.rationale: Extremely high genetic risk drives the score despite no current disease; surveillance is lifesaving

input: Stratify: 45yo male, stage I colon cancer (T2N0M0), MSS, TMB-low. No germline pathogenic variants on multigene panel. No actionable somatic mutations. DPYD *1/*1, UGT1A1 *1/*1. ECOG 0. Charlson 0. Planned: surgery alone (no adjuvant chemo for T2N0).

expected_details.rationale: No risk amplifiers across any dimension; standard of care without intensification
